title: Drip
Combustion

Venom
Focal
Nova
Church 9
code:
Making animated, looped backgrounds for my church again
for(float i,z,d;i++<1e2;){vec3 p=z*normalize(FC.rgb*2.-r.xyy);p.z-=t*PI/10.;for(d=1.;d<64.;d+=d)p+=.7*sin(p.yzx*d-t*d*PI/10.)/d;z+=d=(.03+.1*abs(abs(p.y)-2.))*.5;o+=(cos(z*.3+p.y/.5+vec4(0,1,2,3)-2.)+1.5)/d;}o=tanh(o/5e3);

title: Starship 8
code:
"Starship 8", now with sparks in 302 chars of #GLSL

vec2 p=(FC.xy-r*.5)/r.y/.1,v;for(float i,l;i<50.;o+=(cos(sin(i)*vec4(1,2,3,0))+1.)/1e3*exp(3.*sin(i+i*(t+p.x/16.)*.1))*(1./(l=length(max(p,p*vec2((3.+snoise2D(v=p+vec2(5.*t+.1*t*i,i)))*.02,1))))+pow(1.+snoise2D(4.*v+l),-2.)/l/l/l/1e3+3./length(p)))p+=cos(++i*i+t/5e1+p.x*.02+i*vec2(11,9))*2.;o=tanh(o);

title: Sparks
code:
"Sparks" in 198 chars of #GLSL

vec2 p=(FC.xy*2.-r)/r.y;vec3 v;for(float i=-1.,N=1e2;i<1.;i+=2./N)v=vec3(cos(N*i*2.4+t+vec2(0,11))*sqrt(1.-i*i),i),o+=(cos(i*4.+vec4(6,1,2,3))+1.)/N/length(p-v.xz/(1./length(p)-v.y));o=tanh(.1*o*o);

title: Log Spiral
code:
Log spiral in 150 chars of #GLSL

vec2 p=(FC.xy*2.-r)/r.y,l=vec2(log(dot(p,p)),atan(p.y,p.x));o=((cos((l.x+l.y)*4.-t)-1.)*exp(l.x*.5)*r.y*.2+4.)*mod(ceil((l.y-t)*vec4(14,-14,0,0)),2.);

title: Fake Yellow
code:
Fake yellow in #GLSL 163 chars of

vec2 p=(FC.xy*2.-r)/r.y;o=(vec4(length(p+.4),length(p-vec2(-.2,.3)),1,length(p-vec2(.3,-.2)))-.5)*r.y*.5;o*=vec4(0,0,1.+o.a,0)+ceil(cos(p.x*2e2))*vec4(1,1,-o.a,1);

for(float i,d;i++<1e2;)o+=(cos(snoise3D((FC.rgb*2.-r.xyy)/r.y*i*.1+t)+i+vec4(0,1,2,3)))/1e1;

title: Fake Fluid
code:
"Fake fluid" in 118 chars of GLSL

vec2 p=FC.xy/r.y*6.;for(float i;i++<8.;o=sin(p.xyxy*.3+vec4(0,1,2,3))*.5+.5)p.x+=sin(p.y+t*.3+i),p*=mat2(6,-8,8,6)/8.;

title: Box 2
code:
Accidentally deleted the original post, so here's again "Morph", but now in 294 chars (-5) of GLSL:

vec3 p=vec3(0,0,2),v=vec3(FC.xy*2.-r,r.y);for(float d,i,n;i++<1e2;p-=v/length(v)*d)o+=d=min(length(max(abs(p*rotate3D((n=snoise2D(p.xy*.2+t*.2)*.2+.4)*t,tan(n+r.xyy)))+n-1.,-n*n*.8))-n*n,.8-p.y),i>5e1?d+=1e-5,v=fract(cos(t+sqrt(FC.x*FC.y*vec3(9,7,5)))*5e3),o=vec4(o.r,texture(b,FC.xy/r)):o*=0.;

title: PONG
Shooting Stars
1 Loop
code:
#ã¤ã¶ããGLSL
Combined fractal with raymarcher in 1 loop!

vec3 p;p.z=t;for(float i,j;i++<3e2;)j=exp(mod(i,7.)),p-=vec3((round(FC.xy)-r*.5)/r.y,1)*(length(max(abs(sin(p*j))-.6,0.))-.4)/j;o+=4./length(fwidth(p))/r.y;

title: Gltch
code:
Gltch #ã¤ã¶ããGLSL 

#define N(x) fsnoise(ceil(x))
vec2 p,c;for(float i=-1.;i<1.;i+=.02)p=(FC.xy*2.-r)*.1/(50.+i),o+=ceil(cos((p*rotate2D(ceil(N(c=p/(.1+N(p)))*8.)*PI/4.)).x/N(N(c)+ceil(c)+t)))*vec4(1.+i,2.-abs(i+i),1.-i,1)/1e2;

title: Rainbow Road 2
code:
Alternative variant. Which do prefer?

vec2 p=(FC.xy*2.-r)/r.y,x,d;for(float i=1.-fract(t),w;i<25.;i+=.1)x=p+(cos(i*vec2(.8,.5)+t)+vec2(0,4.-i))/i,d=vec2(8,sin(i)*.8)/i,w=clamp(dot(x,d)/dot(d,d),-.5,.5),o.rgb+=hsv(floor(w/.1)*.1+.5,1.,1.)/(length(x-d*w)+i/1e3)/max(i*i,5.)/5e1;

title: Stochastic DOF
code:
Stochastic DOF in 198 Chars #ã¤ã¶ããGLSL

float i,e;vec3 c,d=(FC.rgb*2.-r.xyx)/r.x,p=vec3(sin(fsnoise(d.xy)*r),0)*.1;for(d-=p*.1;i++<2e2;p+=d*e)e=length(max(abs(cos(p))-sin(t+(c=ceil(p.yzx/PI))+c.yzx*4.)*.2-.2,0.)-.08)-.1,i>1e2?d/=d,o+=e:o;

title: One Cube Challenge
code:
"One Cube Challenge" in 141 characters: #ã¤ã¶ããGLSL

for(vec3 d=(FC .xyz*2.-r.xyy)/r.y*.9,p=vec3(0,0,25),q;o.w++<2e2;q=p+=d*length(min(9.-abs(q=p*rotate3D(t,r.yxy)),.8))-d)o.rgb=9./r.y/fwidth(q);

title: Mars
Flash
code:
Loosely inspired by NASA's new images.
This is only 174 chars of GLSL!

vec3 d=(FC.xzy*2.-r.xyy)/r.y,p=d*fsnoise(d.xz),q;for(p.y+=40.;o.w++<8e1;p+=d)o+=max(snoise3D(q=p*rotate3D(t,r.yyx)*.1)/abs(dot(p,p)-4e2+2e1*snoise3D(q*.5)),0.)*vec4(4,3,2,1);

title: Block City
code:
Inspired by @Yann_LeGall
234 chars of #GLSL:

vec2 c,p,i;for(float i;i++<1e2;c=(round(FC.xy)-vec2(0,i+i-1e2)-r*.5)*mat2(1,.4,0,2)/r.y,p=mod(ceil(c/dot(c,c)+vec2(t,0)),10.))
o+=step(i/5e1,snoise2D(p)+1.)*(i*(sin(p.x*p.y+vec4(0,1,2,0))+1.5)/2e2-o);o*=o/length(fwidth(o*5e2)+9.)*3e1;
